name: Application Form Page
summary: Page with embedded ADSP form for collecting user data as part of a service application.

structure.intro: Brief context about the form and what user needs to complete it
structure.help: Optional sidebar or inline help content

requiredElements: Page heading explaining the form purpose
Navigation to confirmation on successful submit

config.definitionId: Form definition ID from Form Service

imports: import { GoabOneColumnLayout, GoabAppHeader, GoabPageBlock, GoabCallout, GoabAppFooter } from '@abgov/react-components';

notes: Always include a privacy/FOIP notice when collecting personal information
List what users need before starting (reduces abandonment)
Use mock mode for prototyping, switch to live for production
Handle submission errors gracefully with clear messaging
